## 🛑 ZeroTools Architectural Checklist
<!-- Please tick all boxes to confirm your PR adheres to the project spec: -->
- [ ] **No Build Tools:** My code requires no build steps (no npm, webpack, vite).
- [ ] **No Frameworks:** I used only Vanilla HTML, CSS, and ES6+ JavaScript.
- [ ] **100% Client-Side:** No data is sent to a backend or external server.
- [ ] **Design System Compliant:** I only used CSS variables from `css/main.css` for colors and spacing.
- [ ] **Icons/Assets:** Any added icons are inline SVGs matching the stroke-width of existing icons.
